realtime.newSupportRequest: There is a new support request from a user
realtime.customerReply: A customer just sent a new reply

tickets.title: Support requests

toasts.copyEmailMissing: This customer does not have an email to copy.

tickets.emptyDetail: Choose a ticket to view details

states.connectionFailed: Unable to connect to the Chatbot Server

shopInfo.title: Store information
shopInfo.description: This information is injected into the system prompt so the bot can introduce the store to customers.

ai.title: AI configuration
ai.description: Adjust the model, creativity temperature, and the bot behavior rules.
ai.modelEmptyLabel: No models found for this provider
ai.modelCatalogFallback: No model list was found, so the chatbot is using a safe fallback list.
ai.systemPromptPlaceholder: Enter rules used when rewriting answers from trusted data...
ai.systemPromptHint: Applies to the response synthesis step when response rewriting is enabled. It does not change the planner, SQL, or product filtering logic.

fields.enableResponseSynthesis: AI rewrites replies from retrieved data

hints.maxProducts: Default: 3. Higher values make replies longer and consume more tokens; increase only when you really need more results.
hints.maxRetries: Default: 1. Number of retries when the Gemini API times out or fails.
hints.planTimeoutMs: Default: 25000ms. Time allowed for AI analysis.
hints.dbTimeoutMs: Default: 6000ms. Time allowed for database queries.
hints.enableResponseSynthesis: Applies only to product- and article-oriented answers. Orders, vouchers, flash sales, and support remain deterministic for safety.

status.title: Chatbot status
status.enabledDescription: The chatbot is active on the customer-facing site.
status.disabledDescription: The chatbot is off - customers cannot see the widget.

welcome.title: Welcome message
welcome.placeholder: Greeting shown when the chatbot opens...

suggestions.title: Quick suggestions
suggestions.description: Suggestion chips displayed under the welcome message.

resetDialog.title: Restore defaults
resetDialog.message: Are you sure you want to restore the entire configuration to its default values? This action cannot be undone.
